allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const f=fs.readFileSync\('public/samplebills/Sample ER Bill.pdf'\); console.log\('Size:', f.length, 'bytes'\); console.log\('Pages:', \(f.toString\(\).match\(/\\/Type\\s*\\/Page[^s]/g\)||[]\).length\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const f=fs.readFileSync\('samplebills/Sample ER Bill.pdf'\); console.log\('Size:', f.length, 'bytes'\); console.log\('Pages:', \(f.toString\(\).match\(/\\/Type\\s*\\/Page[^s]/g\)||[]\).length\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const t=fs.readFileSync\('samplebills/Sample ER Bill.pdf','utf8'\); const pages=t.split\(/\\/Type\\s*\\/Page[^s]/\); pages.forEach\(\(p,i\)=>{if\(i===0\)return; const hasText=p.includes\('/Font'\)||p.includes\('BT'\); const hasImage=p.includes\('/Image'\)||p.includes\('/XObject'\); console.log\('Page '+i+': text='+hasText+' image='+hasImage+' size='+p.length\)}\)")
